title: Corazon Steals the Fruit
description: Pages 12–16 focus on corazon steals the fruit, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as corazon risks everything to steal the Ope Ope no Mi for Law, turning the flashback into a desperate rescue mission.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: In the society I come from, the children are all told...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: [Bad kids will get eaten by "D"]

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: and every time someone with the name of "D" begins to make a name for themselves in the world...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: All the elders all groan and mutter...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: [That "D" will surely bring with them another storm...]

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What the hell are you trying to say?! That I'm some kind of monster or something?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: -perhaps. No one knows the actual truth.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It's a name that people have secretly been inherited through- out history all across the world....!!

dialogue.speaker: Donquixote Family
dialogue.text: -There is a land where they refer to the "family of D" as this....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: "God's natural enemy"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: If, for example, you consider "God" to be the "ten- Ryubito"...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Then perhaps your peoples' objective might very well be... to "destroy this world"!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: But instead dofy is after the complete opposite of that!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: "D" is supposed to be the antithesis of "God".

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I don't understand a damn word you are saying!!

dialogue.speaker: Donquixote Family
dialogue.text: I don't became a understand part of this a damn word family... you are so... saying!!

dialogue.speaker: Donquixote Family
dialogue.text: I became a part of this family...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: So that I'd be able to kill the people I need to kill!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I didn't become your subordinate!! I became Dofla- Mingo's!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: And besides, I'm going to die in one year anyways... so what do you expect me to do?!

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: Leave this place and search for a cure!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: It doesn't exist!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'm going to go tell Doflamingo about all of this!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: that you can speak...and about your power!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Don't!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: I'll bet he's gonna do a whole lot more to you than just kick you out!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: You little shit!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: HYU!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: DAAA AAAA AHA!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: ZWosh!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: I haven't just been sitting idly by these past two years!! I'm stronger now!!

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: Hey, law!! You broke the blood rules again, didn't you?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Hey!! What were you two up to flapping your mouths over there?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: [Dabyan

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: I'll buy you an ice cream, so shut up already.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Make that an extra- large, 500b, ice cream, dasuyan!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Babys, lend me some cash.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: EH?! o... okay :)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Oh my gosh...he... needs me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: So...this is how it ends for me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: Dannit....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: I trusted that brat and spilled my guts...

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: CORAZON!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: You're Back? We're Disem- Banking!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: It's "head- quarters" again!!!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: The Marines have found us.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: ...?...Has he not told him yet?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: Hehehe

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: I decided not to tell him.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: When I thought about it... I realized I had owed you a debt.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: Two years ago when I stabbed you... you didn't rat me out.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: So now...Consider us even...

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: Where are Law and Cora- Zon?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: I saw them board the ship, but now I can't find them anywhere!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: It appears they took their belongings and left!!

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: Young Master...!! This was in Corazon's hammock.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: ... what...the hell... is this....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: This is kid- napping....!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: PURU RURURU RURU...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: PURU RURURU RU...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #51
dialogue.text: Hey, the Dender- Mush!! Answer it!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: It's Doflamingo calling, isn't it?! Let me talk to him!! Answer it!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: DOFLA- MINGOO~!! SAVE ME~!!

summary: Corazon Steals the Fruit advances the Dressrosa story through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
